```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.4em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:0.85fr auto 1.3fr;gap:0.85em;align-items:center;">

  <!-- reference: held still (teal) -->
  <div style="text-align:center;">
   <div style="display:inline-block;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.28);border-radius:12px;padding:0.5em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.14);">
    <div style="width:4.4em;height:4.4em;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EAF6F1,#DBEEE6);border:1px dashed #9CCBBD;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.35em;">
     <i data-lucide="anchor" style="width:1.3em;height:1.3em;stroke-width:1.7;color:#2C8475;"></i>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;color:#2C8475;">reference</div>
    </div>
   </div>
   <div style="margin-top:0.45em;font-size:0.46em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.35;">bottle + seal<br><span style="font-weight:400;color:#7FA89C;">held still</span></div>
  </div>

  <!-- connector: the script -->
  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
   <div style="background:#1E1E2E;border-radius:8px;padding:0.4em 0.65em;box-shadow:0 5px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.22);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
    <i data-lucide="terminal" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:2;color:#69B4F0;"></i>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#F8F7F0;white-space:nowrap;">image_to_image.py</span>
   </div>
   <i data-lucide="arrow-right" style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;stroke-width:2.2;color:#B5A78F;"></i>
   <div style="font-size:0.4em;color:#9B8EA0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;">fill the liquid</div>
  </div>

  <!-- outputs: liquid varies (coral) -->
  <div>
   <div style="display:flex;gap:0.6em;justify-content:center;">
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.5em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,62,80,0.12);border:1px solid #EFE6D6;">
     <img src="figs/cooking-oil.png" alt="Cooking oil" style="width:4.4em;height:4.4em;object-fit:contain;display:block;border-radius:8px;" />
    </div>
    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.5em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,62,80,0.12);border:1px solid #EFE6D6;">
     <img src="figs/light-soy-sauce.png" alt="Light soy sauce" style="width:4.4em;height:4.4em;object-fit:contain;display:block;border-radius:8px;" />
    </div>
   </div>
   <div style="margin-top:0.45em;font-size:0.46em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;text-align:center;line-height:1.35;">liquid: color &amp; texture vary<br><span style="font-weight:400;color:#C79184;">left free</span></div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:1em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid rgba(86,84,162,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.6em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);">
  <i data-lucide="blend" style="width:1.1em;height:1.1em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"></i>
  <div style="font-size:0.52em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.5;">One saved reference plus a script: the container is <strong style="color:#2C8475;">deterministic</strong>, only the contents are <strong style="color:#D45F47;">random</strong>. Both, in a single asset.</div>
 </div>

</div>
```
